title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Boat - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Boat - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!
